title: convolvulus stolonifer
intro: Convolvulus stolonifer, also known as silver moon, is a type of flowering vine that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. Convolvulus stolonifer has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Convolvulus stolonifer can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
